{{nihongo|'''Takanono Shrine'''|竹野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Takanono Shrine'''|竹野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takanono Shrine'''|竹野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takanono Shrine'''|竹野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takanono Shrine'''|竹野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Takanono Shrine (Q135040588) | native_name = 竹野神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Takanono Shrine (Q135040588) | coordinates = {{coord|35.736699|135.112602}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Takanono Shrine'''|竹野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==
